summary: Successfully completed frontend testing of Romanian Members & Guests Management App. Both critical features are working perfectly: Total Lună column updates in real-time when Taxa is changed, and PDF Export functionality generates proper PDFs using html2pdf.js. All core functionality tested and verified.

design_issues.issue: Session expires relatively quickly requiring frequent re-authentication
design_issues.impact: User experience - users need to login frequently

passed_tests: Frontend - User authentication with admin/admin123 credentials
Frontend - Dashboard loads correctly with Romanian interface
Frontend - Total Lună real-time update when Taxa is changed (25→40, correctly calculated 25.00→40.00)
Frontend - PDF Export functionality using html2pdf.js (successfully downloaded prezenta_2025-12-17.pdf)
Frontend - Members table displays correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend - Taxa input fields are editable and trigger real-time calculations
Frontend - Application maintains responsive design and proper styling
Integration - Frontend-backend communication for attendance updates works correctly

success_percentage.backend: Not tested (frontend only testing as requested)
